problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Combining Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
